meta.short_description: Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!

meta.description:
Based on simple and intuitive hand management, Heat: Pedal to the Metal puts players in the driver's seat of intense car races, jockeying for position to cross the finish line first, while managing their car's speed if they don't want to overheat. Selecting the right upgrades for their car will help them hug the curves and keep their engine cool enough to maintain top speeds. Ultimately, their driving skills will be the key to victory!

Drivers can compete in a single race or use the "Championship System" to play a whole season in one game night, customizing their car before each race to claim the top spot of the podium. They have to be careful as the weather, road conditions, and events will change every race to spice up their championship. Players can also enjoy a solo mode with the Legends Module or add automated drivers as additional opponents in multiplayer games.

—description from the publisher

Microbadges

Card size: 56x87 mm

Table of Contents

Heat: Pedal to the Metal (2022) Components


  • 2 giant double-sided boards (4 tracks)
    1. USA
      • 69 Spaces
      • 4 Corners (Speedlimits 7,3,3,2)
      • 2 Laps
      • 6 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
    2. Great Britain
      • 63 Spaces
      • 5 Corners (Speedlimits 10,6,5,4,3)
      • 2 Laps
      • 6 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
    3. France
      • 60 Spaces
      • 5 Corners (Speedlimits 5,2,4,3,4)
      • 2 Laps
      • 6 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
    4. Italy
      • 54 Spaces
      • 3 Corners (Speedlimits 5,2,3)
      • 3 Laps
      • 6 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
  • 6 race cars, Gear Shift Pawns, and Player Mats
    1. Black
    2. Green
    3. Blue
    4. Red
    5. Silver
    6. Yellow
  • 72 Basic Cards (12 for each color)
    1. Speed 1 (3 copies)
    2. Speed 2 (3 copies)
    3. Speed 3 (3 copies)
    4. Speed 4 (3 copies)
  • 18 Starting Upgrade Cards (3 for each color)
    1. Speed 0 (1 copy)
    2. Speed 5 (1 copy)
    3. Heat Card for deck, not Engine (1 copy)
  • 37 Stress Cards (Cards for deck as noted on map)
  • 48 Heat Cards (Cards for Engine as noted on map)
For Advanced Game from Base Box

Garage Module


  • 96 Upgrade Cards (Chosen in Draft, replaces "starting upgrade cards")
    1. Basic Upgrade Cards (34, three of each cards #1-17)
      • (1) 4 Wheel Drive: 4 speed and a + boost.
      • (2) 4 Wheel Drive: + boost 3 times.
      • (3) 4 Wheel Drive: + boost, Cooldown 3 Heat.
      • (4) Bodywork: 3 speed, Reduce Stress by 2.
      • (5) Bodywork: 5 speed, Reduce Stress by 1.
      • (6) Bodywork: 1 speed, Reduce Stress by 3.
      • (7) Brakes: Speed of 1, 2, 3 or 4, pay 1 Heat.
      • (8) Brakes: Speed of 1 or 3.
      • (9) Brakes: Speed of 2 or 4.
      • (10) Brakes: Speed of 1 or 5.
      • (11) Cooling system: 6 speed, Cooldown 1 Heat, pay 1 Heat.
      • (12) Cooling system: 1 speed, Cooldown 2 Heat.
      • (13) Cooling system: 3 speed, Cooldown 1 Heat.
      • (14) R.P.M.: 1 speed, Slipstream boost of 1 space.
      • (15) R.P.M.: 2 speed, Slipstream boost of 2 spaces.
      • (16) R.P.M.: 3 speed, Slipstream boost of 2 spaces.
      • (17) Heat: functions as a Heat Card.
    2. Advanced Upgrade Cards (62, three of each cards #18-48)
      • (18) Bodywork: 6 speed, Reduce Stress by 3, pay 1 Heat.
      • (19) Bodywork: 2 speed, Reduce Stress by 1, Scrap 2 cards.
      • (20) Bodywork: 2 speed, Reduce Stress by 1, Slipstream boost of 1 space.
      • (21) Cooling system: 4 speed, Scrap 2 cards, Cooldown 1 Heat.
      • (22) Fuel: 2 speed, Salvage 2 cards.
      • (23) Fuel: + boost, Salvage 2 cards, Cooldown 1 Heat.
      • (24) Gas pedal: Direct play, 1 speed, Scrap 1 card.
      • (25) Gas pedal: Direct play, 2 speed, Scrap 2 cards.
      • (26) Gas pedal: Direct play, 3 speed, Scrap 3 card.
      • (27) Gas pedal: Direct play, 4 speed, pay 1 Heat, Cooldown 1 Heat.
      • (28) Gas pedal: Direct play, 1 speed, Scrap 5 cards, Accelerate.
      • (29) R.P.M.: + boost, Slipstream boost of 3 spaces.
      • (30) R.P.M.: 1 speed, pay 1 Heat, Slipstream boost of 3 spaces.
      • (31) R.P.M.: Speed of 1 or 2, Slipstream boost of 1 space.
      • (32) Suspension: 2 speed, Reduce Stress by 1, Refresh.
      • (33) Suspension: 2 speed, Cooldown 1 Heat, Refresh.
      • (34) Suspension: 4 speed, Refresh.
      • (35) Suspension: 1 speed, Slipstream boost of 1 space, Refresh.
      • (36) Tyres: 2 speed, Cooldown 3 Heat, Adjust speed limit by -1.
      • (37) Tyres: 1 speed, Scrap 2 cards, Adjust speed limit by +1.
      • (38) Tyres: 2 speed, Scrap 2 cards, Adjust speed limit by +1.
      • (39) Tyres: 3 speed, Cooldown 2 Heat, Adjust speed limit by -1.
      • (40) Tyres: + boost, Cooldown 1 Heat, Slipstream boost of 1 space, Adjust speed limit by +1.
      • (41) Tyres: + boost 2 times, Adjust speed limit by +2.
      • (42) Turbocharger: 7 speed, pay 2 Heat, Cooldown 3 Heat.
      • (43) Turbocharger: 8 speed, pay 1 Heat, Scrap 6 cards.
      • (44) Wing: 4 speed, pay 1 Heat, Scrap 2 cards, Adjust speed limit by +2.
      • (45) Wing: 3 speed, pay 1 Heat, Scrap 2 cards, Adjust speed limit by +2.
      • (46) Wing: 6 speed, pay 2 Heat, Adjust speed limit by +3.
      • (47) 4 Wheel Drive: + boost, Accelerate.
      • (48) Heat: functions as a Heat Card, starts in deck.

Weather & Road Condition Module


  • 6 Weather Tokens
    1. Freezing Cold : -1 Stress Card in the deck, Cooling Bonus.
    2. Heavy Rain : +1 Stress Card in the deck, +2 Slipstream boost.
    3. Rain : 3 Heat Cards shuffled in the deck, Cooling Bonus.
    4. Fog : +1 Heat Card in the Engine, No slipstream.
    5. Cloudy : -1 Stress Card in the deck, No cooling.
    6. Sunny : 3 Heat Cards placed in the discard, +2 Slipstream boost.
  • 12 Road Conditions Tokens (2 each)
    1. Corner
      • +1 Speed in Turn
      • -1 Speed in Turn
      • Overheat: +1 Heat if needing to pay heat
    2. Sector
      • +1 Slipstream space
      • Heat Control: May Boost without paying Heat
      • Weather: refer to Weather Token

Legends Module (Add AI controlled cards to board)


  • 1 Legends Mat
  • 10 Legends Cards (the AI)

Championship System Module


  • 1 Championship Mat
  • 2 Press Corner Standees
  • 10 Event Cards
    1. 1961
    2. New Grandstand Inauguration
      • First three drivers to cross Finish Line on Lap 1 gain Sponsorship Card
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +2 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1961, Race 1, Great Britain
    3. New Speed Record
      • Reach speed 15+ gain Sponsorship Card
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1961, Race 2, USA
    4. Driver's Strike
      • -1 Lap, winner gain +2 Championship Points
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1961, Race 3, Italy
    5. 1962
    6. Engine Restrictions Lifted
      • +1 Heat in Engine
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +2 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1962, Race 1, Italy
    7. Attendance Record
      • +1 Lap, +1 Card in Hand
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1962, Race 2, Great Britain
    8. Corruption with the Regulation Commission
      • First three drivers to finish will get +1 Championship Point
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1962, Race 3, France
    9. 1963
    10. New Main Sponsor
      • No additional rules
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +3 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1963, Race 1, USA
    11. First Live Television Race
      • If you overtake three cars on your turn, +1 Sponsorship Card
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1963, Race 2, Great Britain
    12. New Security Rules
      • -2 Heat, -1 Stress, -1 Hand Size
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1963, Race 3, France
    13. Main Sponsor Withdraws
      • +1 Stress, a spinout is disqualifying
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +0 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1963, Race 4, Italy
  • 4 Track Cards
  • 35 Sponsorship Cards (7 of each)
    1. APERAULT RPM Cie : Speed 1, Slipstream boost +2.
    2. DE ANGELI WINGS Inc. : Speed 3, Adjust Corner Speed +1.
    3. DRAMDO BRAKESTM : Speed 1/2/3/4.
    4. FREDO&F.LLO C.S. : Speed 4, Cooldown 2.
    5. LORD&Co. T.B. : Speed 6
  • 1 Scorepad

Heat: Heavy Rain (2024) Components


  • 1 giant double-sided boards (2 tracks)
    1. Japan
      • 60 Spaces (19 Flooded Spaces, +1 Heat to shift any gear)
      • 5 Corners (Speedlimits Chicane (4,4),2,5,3)
      • 2 Laps
      • 7 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
    2. Mexico
      • 60 Spaces
      • 6 Corners (Speedlimits Chicane(7,7),6,4,Chicane(2,2))
      • 3 Laps
      • 6 Heat Cards
      • 2 Stress Cards
  • 1 race car, Gear Shift Pawn, Player Mat, Basic Cards, and Starting Upgrade Cards
    1. Orange
  • 15 Heat Cards
  • 5 Stress Cards
  • 12 Advanced Upgrade Cards (two of each #49-54)
      • (49) Air Intake: 1 speed, Super Cool 1 Heat, Salvage 4 cards, -1 Speed Limit
      • (50) Air Intake: 0 speed, Reduce Stress by 1, Super Cool 1 Heat, Slipstream boost of 1 space.
      • (51) Air Intake: 1 speed, Scrap 1 card, Cooldown 1 Heat, Super Cool 1 Heat.
      • (52) Air Intake: 3 speed, Scrap 3 cards, Super Cool 1 Heat.
      • (53) Air Intake: 4 speed, Scrap 4 cards, Super Cool 1 Heat.
      • (54) Air Intake: + boost, Super Cool 1 Heat, -1 Speed Limit, Refresh.
  • 7 Sponsorship Cards (7 of each)
    1. E.MERCURY AIR SYSTEM : Speed 0, Super Cool 2
  • 4 Event Cards
    1. 1964
    2. Going Global
      • +2 Sponsorship Cards instead of 1 for Press Corners
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +0 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1964, Race 1, Japan
    3. Storm Warning
      • Slipstream only in 3 or 4 gear
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1964, Race 2, Mexico
    4. Chicanes for Safety
      • You may discard Heat from Hand during Discard Phase
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1964, Race 3, Mexico
    5. Heavy Rain Expected
      • No adrenaline during the race
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1964, Race 4, Japan
  • 2 Track Cards
  • 1 Scorepad

Heat: Tunnel Vision (2025) Components


  • 1 giant double-sided boards (2 tracks)
    1. Spain
      • 109 Spaces (36 Tunnel Spaces, No Discard)
      • 11 Corners (Speedlimits 5,4,Chicane(4,4),2,5,2,3,Chicane(4,4),3)
      • 1 Laps
      • 6 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
    2. Netherlands
      • 55 Spaces
      • 5 Corners (Speedlimits Chicane(5,5),3,8,4)
      • 3 Laps
      • 6 Heat Cards
      • 2 Stress Cards
  • 1 race car, Gear Shift Pawn, Player Mat, Speed Cards, and Starting Upgrade Cards
    1. Purple
  • 9 Heat Cards
  • 6 Stress Cards
  • 12 Advanced Upgrade Cards (two of each #55-60)
      • (55) Front Wing: + boost, Draft 3 spaces
      • (56) Front Wing: 0 speed, Draft 1 spaces, Direct Play, Refresh
      • (57) Front Wing: 2 speed, Draft 2 spaces, Salvage 2 cards, Scrap 5 cards.
      • (58) Front Wing: 3 speed, Draft 1 space, +1 Speed Limit, Scrap 3 cards
      • (59) Front Wing: 4 speed, Draft 1 space, Refresh, Scrap 4 cards
      • (60) Front Wing: 6 speed, Draft 2 spaces, Overheat 1
  • 7 Sponsorship Cards (7 of each)
    1. EOLE WINGS INDUSTRIES : Speed 5, Draft 2.
  • 4 Event Cards
    1. 1965
    2. Hold on Tight
      • Max 1 Card per turn can be discarded
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +2 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1965, Race 1, Great Britain
    3. Smile and Wave
      • In presscorner, only gain Sponsorship Card if slower than speed limit
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +0 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1965, Race 2, USA
    4. Tunnel Vision
      • You may discard Stress Cards during step 8
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +0 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1965, Race 3, Spain
    5. The Pressure Cooker
      • +1 Lap, in Step 8 discard 1 Heat
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1965, Race 4, Netherlands
  • 2 Track Cards
  • 1 Scorepad

Heat: Rocky Roads (2026) Components


  • 1 giant double-sided boards (2 tracks)
    1. South Africa
      • 71 Spaces (9 Full and 21 Half Gravel Spaces, Pay one Heat in Step 9)
      • 7 Corners (Speedlimits 4,3,2,6,5,2,4)
      • 2 Laps
      • 7 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
    2. Germany
      • 62 Spaces
      • 6 Corners (Speedlimits 5,Chicane(2,2),4,4,4)
      • 2 Laps
      • 5 Heat Cards
      • 3 Stress Cards
  • 1 race car, Gear Shift Pawn, Player Mat, Speed Cards, and Starting Upgrade Cards
    1. White
  • 15 Heat Cards
  • 5 Stress Cards
  • 12 Advanced Upgrade Cards (2 of each #61-66)
      • (61) Sliding Skirts: + Boost, Additional Slipstream, +1 Speed Limit, Reduce Stress
      • (62) Sliding Skirts: 1 speed, Additional Slipstream, +1 Slipstream Boost
      • (63) Sliding Skirts: 1 speed, Additional Slipstream, Refresh
      • (64) Sliding Skirts: 2 speed, Additional Slipstream, Direct Play
      • (65) Sliding Skirts: 2 or 3 speed, Additional Slipstream
      • (66) Sliding Skirts: 4 or 6 speed, Additional Slipstream, overheat 1
  • 7 Sponsorship Cards (7 of each)
    1. THUNDER VALLEY AERO: Additional Slipstream move, not limited to one
  • 4 Event Cards
    1. 1966
    2. Tight Maneuvers
      • Slipstream reduced 1 space
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1966, Race 1, France
    3. Smooth Start
      • Before Race, all stress goes in discard pile
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1966, Race 2, Germany
    4. The Crowd Goes Wile
      • First 2 Drivers to cross "B Corner" gain Sponsorship Card
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +0 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1966, Race 3, Italy
    5. Consulting the Mechanics
      • Before Race, Choose +1 Heat & Stress or -1 Heat & Stress
      • Setup Adjustments: each player +1 Sponsorship Cards
      • Championship Season: 1966, Race 4, South Africa
  • 2 Track Cards
  • 1 Scorepad

Heat: Legends (2026) Components


  • 36 Legends Cards (12 for each level, replaces Legend Deck from Base Box)
    1. Green - Level 2 difficulty (2 Stars on card)
    2. Yellow - Level 4 difficulty (4 Stars on card)
    3. Red - Level 6 difficulty (6 Stars on card)
  • 36 Power Up Cards
    1. 12 with Star Power of Full Throttle
    2. 12 with Star Power of Slipstream
    3. 12 with Star Power of Draft 3
      • Each group of 12 also has 2 each Rival Ablility for Full Throttle, Slipstream, Adjust Speed, Reckless, Impeding, and Nimble
  • 21 Sponsorship Cards [7 of each]
    1. MOQUETTE PROGRIP: 2 Speed, Direct Play
    2. BEEWEE RACECRAFT: 4 Speed, 2 Salvage
    3. NOCTIE MOTORSPORT: 7 Speed, -1 Speedlimit
  • 12 Rival Cards (one for each color of car)
